raw_consumer_statement:
Case ID : XXXX I am filing a complaint against Citibank for failing to properly investigate my credit card dispute for {$63.00}. Citibank denied my dispute on XX/XX/year>, incorrectly claiming that " The merchandise is still in your possession. ".

This claim is factually false. My provided evidence proves the merchant received the returned item : - I returned the merchandise using the merchant 's provided XXXX  return label. 
- The XXXX tracking number is XXXX. 
- XXXX  successfully delivered the package on XX/XX/year>, at XXXX XXXX. 
- The package was delivered to XXXX, SC. 
- The delivery address of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, SC XXXX is the official XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX . 

Because the merchant safely received the returned merchandise, I am no longer in possession of it and am entitled to my refund. Citibank failed to verify basic tracking data before reversing my conditional credit.
